for_sales.sales_text:
The Ebihen 16 is fantastic water-ballasted dayboat suitable for the family, single handed sailing, racing and camp cruising. It is a boat that was designed by renowned French naval architect, Francois Vivier - very much in the spirit of the traditional Breton working boats but built using modern techniques and materials. These boats are very rarely available in the UK. This particular example was built by an experienced amateur using the very best materials, fittings and finishes. It was launched in 2022, not used at all in 2023 or 2025 and only lightly used in 2024. It has been stored under cover when not in use and is in pristine condition, throughout, and ready to launch.

Gaff main and jib in Clipper canvas by James Lawrence. Both have covers. Jib has Aeroluffspar reefing/furling.

12v battery with solar panel and charge controller  

Electric and manual bilge pumps

Fire extinguisher

Pair of 3.1 m oars with oarlocks, sculling notch

Professionally Coppercoated below the waterline in 2023

De Graaff braked trailer with spare wheel and lightboard

Flat cover for trailing and storage by Trident UK

Pair of galley boxes for camp cruising

Tent for camp cruising (not fully fitted)

There is an option to buy an ePropulsion Spirit 1.0 electric motor.

boat.name: Alouette
boat.short_description: Alouette is a small gaffer based on the Breton tradition but built using modern materials and techniques.
